name: can-diag
description: CAN bus diagnostics via NDR — v3 with correct devctl codes (class=5, cmd=7/8 from NavigationNdrInfo disassembly). Probes devctl format, scans ~25 ECU module addresses, reads fault codes, module info, and live sensor data. READ-ONLY — no writes to vehicle systems.
author: dspl1236
scripts: can_diag.sh - Full 5-phase diagnostic: probe, scan, identify, DTC, summary
scan_modules.sh - Quick module scanner — run from telnet interactively
read_dtc.sh - Read fault codes from a specific module
read_module_info.sh - Read part numbers, SW/HW versions from a module
read_live_data.sh - Read live sensor data (RPM, temp, speed, oil)
grab_binaries.sh - Extract key binaries from car for offline analysis
notes: devctl codes 0xC0040507 (write) and 0xC0040508 (read) discovered from NavigationNdrInfo disassembly on PCM 3.1. Same codes likely apply to MMI3G+ and RNS-850 (same NDR codebase).
